reviews.text: The Lead Machine changed our business. We went from chasing leads to closing them in minutes.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.content: RRRTX doesn't just talk about AI. They ship real, working systems. The ROI was visible in 48 hours.

case_studies.title: Roofing Contractor Automation
